prompt: A cinematic luxury product advertisement shot of a vintage wooden turntable playing a translucent bright red vinyl record in a warm, dimly lit living room. Behind the turntable, an upright album cover dominates the frame with a bold distressed red background and large condensed cream-white block lettering reading BELLA CIAO at the upper left, with smaller black text beneath reading SOUNDTRACK OF THE RESISTANCE. The cover art shows a dark black silhouette of a hooded figure centered against the red field, with a row of small marching figures along the bottom edge and faint architectural line art on the lower left, evoking political resistance and dramatic soundtrack imagery. The turntable is shown in three-quarter view on a wooden table, with a brushed metal platter rim, black tonearm resting on the record at the right, and a small metallic control knob visible at front left. Use a shallow depth of field, premium editorial lighting, rich amber highlights, soft candle glow in the background on the right, shelves and home interior details blurred in the background, and a high-end fashion-campaign-meets-music-product aesthetic. At the bottom of the image, add a bold promotional banner overlay with large white condensed all-caps text reading SOUNDTRACK OF THE RESISTANCE and a centered red rectangular button underneath with white all-caps text reading SHOP NOW. Include a small white Pollo.ai watermark in the top-right corner. Ultra-realistic photography, sharp focus on the vinyl and cover, moody luxurious atmosphere, social-media ad composition, vertical 2:3 format.
